CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-TOUCH_AND_TU: If the target has[gold]Imbalance[/gold], immediately make it enter[gold]Weightless[/gold]. Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}for every20[gold]Imbalance[/gold]removed this way.
Retain. If the target has[gold]Imbalance[/gold], immediately make it enter[gold]Weightless[/gold]. Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}for every20[gold]Imbalance[/gold]removed this way.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-GRAVITY_NODE: Apply{ImbalancePower}[gold]Imbalance[/gold], then deal{Damage}damage. If this card makes the target enter[gold]Weightless[/gold]/kills the target, permanently increase this card's applied[gold]Imbalance[/gold]/damage by{ImbalanceIncrease}/{DamageIncrease}.

Apply{ImbalancePower}[gold]Imbalance[/gold], then deal{Damage}damage. If this card makes the target enter[gold]Weightless[/gold]/kills the target, permanently increase this card's applied[gold]Imbalance[/gold]/damage by{ImbalanceIncrease}/{DamageIncrease}.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-DELIVERY_FLO: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Choose1card in your hand and send it.
Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Choose1card in your hand and send it.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-PACKAGE_PREV: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain the most recently sent card, then put it on top of your draw pile.
Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain the most recently sent card, then put it on top of your draw pile.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-EARLY_DELIVE: Immediately gain your sent cards. Apply{ImbalancePower:diff()}[gold]Imbalance[/gold]to all enemies.
Immediately gain your sent cards. Apply{ImbalancePower:diff()}[gold]Imbalance[/gold]to all enemies.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-MIRACLE_COUR: Send all other cards in your hand. Then draw that many cards.
Send all other cards in your hand. Then draw that many cards.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-PACKAGE_EXPR: Choose1card in your hand and send it. Draw{Cards:diff()}cards.
Choose1card in your hand and send it. Draw{Cards:diff()}cards.
DELIVERED.title: Delivered
DELIVERED.description: This card triggers an additional effect when it is[gold]delivered[/gold].
